roles.farmerDesc: Buy inputs, track prices, join groups

login.tagline: Connecting Nigerian farmers with input suppliers, aggregators, and buyers.
login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter your email or phone number and PIN.
login.forgotPinNote: If you signed up with an email, PIN reset by email is coming soon. Otherwise, contact your local OjàFarm agent.
login.errInvalid: Invalid email/phone or PIN. Check your details or create an account.
login.errGeneric: Sign in failed. Please try again.

signup.tagline: Create an account to buy inputs, track prices, and connect with buyers.
signup.title: Create account
signup.subtitle: Join as a farmer or supplier. It only takes a minute.
signup.locationHelp: Where do you farm or operate? This tailors your prices and advisories.
signup.emailHint: Add an email to sign in with it and recover your PIN later.
signup.errName: Enter your full name (at least 2 characters).
signup.errExists: An account with this phone number already exists.
signup.errGeneric: Could not create your account. Please try again.
